name: Artisan Ténébreux

Can parry melee attacks (reduces damage by 50%)

uniques: Attacks cause [5] damage to adjacent enemy units

name: Avatar de la Ruine
uniques: May attack multiple times per turn (max 3)
Enemy units within 2 tiles receive [20]% combat penalty

name: Cataclysme Vivant
uniques: When defeating a unit, heal [50] HP

name: Archidémon du Vide
uniques: Can summon a [Démon Mineur] unit every 5 turns

name: Seigneur des Abysses
uniques: Absorbs defeated units (gain 10% of their combat strength)

name: Empereur du Chaos
uniques: All enemy units in adjacent tiles take [15] damage per turn
Can sacrifice population for combat bonus (+10% per pop)

name: Dévoreur d'Âmes
uniques: Can consume [Great Person] for permanent +5 combat strength

name: Parangon du Mal Absolu
uniques: Can use enemy roads as if they were your own

name: Divinité Corrompue

Heals fully after killing a unit

name: Némésis Originelle
uniques: Creates a [Zone de Désolation] (2 tiles radius reducing enemy combat by 15%)

name: Ultime Fléau
uniques: Can appear in any tile with [Pillage] improvement
Units adjacent to this unit cannot heal

name: Eclipse Vivante
uniques: Enemy cities within 3 tiles lose [10]% of their defense per turn

name: Anéantissement Total
uniques: Each kill increases combat strength by +1 permanently (max 50)

name: Crépuscule Éternel
uniques: Can teleport between any of your cities
Damage taken is reduced by 50% from all sources

name: Nullité Cosmique
uniques: Can absorb Great Works for +10 combat strength
All enemy units in sight lose [10] HP per turn

name: Éveil du Néant
uniques: Creates a [Rift Dimensionnel] when killing a unit (reduces enemy movement)

name: Aube du Chaos
uniques: Can convert captured cities to [Noyau Démoniaque] automatically
All your cities produce +50% [Faith] when this unit exists

name: Apothéose Démoniaque
uniques: Gains +5 combat strength per era progressed

name: Déicide Vivant
uniques: Can absorb [Holy Sites] for permanent combat boost

name: Ascendance des Ténèbres
uniques: All enemy units lose [25]% combat strength within 5 tiles

name: Principe du Mal
uniques: Can create [Corruption] on enemy tiles (blocks resource usage)
Each city conquered increases combat strength by +2 permanently

name: Incarnation du Péché
uniques: Heals 50 HP per turn regardless of action

name: Concept Absolu
uniques: Gains +1 movement per every 10 levels of XP

name: Raison d'Être
uniques: Can change the terrain of tiles to [Corrupted Land]
Enemy units defeated become [Souffres Démoniaques] under your control

name: Absolu Primordial
uniques: Can absorb [Natural Wonders] for permanent +10 combat strength
Creates a copy of itself when killing a [Hero] unit

name: Oméga Démoniaque
uniques: Can destroy enemy [Capital] in one attack if below 25% HP
All your units gain +25% combat strength when this unit is alive

name: Alpha de la Fin
uniques: Can create [Chaos Vortex] that damages all units within 3 tiles by 20 HP per turn
Immortal: This unit cannot die except by [Divine Intervention]

name: Symphonie du Chaos
uniques: Can play [Chaos Symphony] affecting all enemy units globally (-20% combat strength for 10 turns)
Each Great Person consumed grants +15 combat strength

name: Évolution Transcendante
uniques: Exists in multiple locations simultaneously (can be in 2 places at once)
Can sacrifice half health to double combat strength for one attack

name: Existence Paradoxale
uniques: Can manipulate time (reset movement after attacking once per 10 turns)
Enemy attacks have 50% chance to miss

name: Théorie Démonique
uniques: Can alter game rules locally (change tile yields for 10 turns)
Gains combat strength equal to 10% of enemy's combat strength

name: Métaphysique Corrompue
uniques: Can deny [Faith] generation for all enemy civilizations for 5 turns
Transforms 50% of damage taken into combat strength

name: Principe Fondamental
uniques: Can rewrite tile properties (change terrain type permanently every 20 turns)

name: Source Originelle
uniques: Can create a [Black Hole] that destroys all units and improvements in 4 tile radius
Respawns after 10 turns if defeated (once per game)

name: Point Oméga
uniques: Can end a civilization's existence (remove all their cities except capital)
Gains +100 combat strength per era after Industrial

name: Singularité Démonique
uniques: Can collapse enemy civilization's [Culture] production to 0 for 20 turns

name: Axe du Mal Universel
uniques: Can shift alignment of any unit to [Démon] permanently
Every 10 kills grants a [Wish] that can change game mechanics

name: Ultime Réalité
uniques: Can create a pocket dimension (city immune to attacks for 10 turns)
All enemy [Great People] spawn as [Corrupted] versions under your control

name: Éveil Cosmique
uniques: Can manipulate victory conditions (delay any victory by 50 turns)
Absorbs all resources from conquered cities permanently

name: Déité du Chaos Total
uniques: Can reset enemy technology tree (revert to previous era)
Every 5 turns, copies the strongest enemy unit's abilities

name: Incarnation de la Fin
uniques: Can delete any tile from the map (becomes void tile)

name: Néant Personnifié
uniques: Can create [Anti-Matter] bombs that destroy 3x3 tile area completely
All civilizations have [Fear] (-50% combat strength) against this unit

name: Ombre du Créateur
uniques: Can rewrite game rules permanently (increase unit cap, change victory conditions)
Exists beyond time (cannot be affected by time-based effects)

name: Paradoxe Final
uniques: Can cause [Time Paradox] resetting all enemy units to previous era every 50 turns
Your civilization cannot lose by any victory condition

name: Dieu Démon Ultime
uniques: Can end the game instantly (Victory: [Ascension Absolue])
Transcends all game mechanics: immune to everything, can act infinitely, can reshape the world at will
Can convert any unit, city, or improvement to your civilization
Permanent: Cannot be removed or destroyed by any means
